blocks.content: Utilize the Antigravity Browser to allow agents to visually test and interact with web applications natively.

blocks.title: Recommended Role
blocks.content: This lab is highly recommended for frontend developers or QA engineers looking to automate end-to-end UI testing.

items.title: 1. Build a Target App
items.content: In the Agent Manager, prompt the agent:
items.prompt: Create a simple index.html file with a Todo List app using standard JavaScript. Include an input field, an 'Add' button, and a list.

items.title: 2. Serve the App
items.content: Run a local python server in your terminal:

items.title: 3. Prompt the Visual Test
items.content: Open a new agent session and prompt:
items.prompt: Navigate to http://localhost:8000. Open the Antigravity Browser, type 'Buy groceries' into the input field, click Add, and verify the item appears in the list.

items.title: 4. Review the Tape
items.content: The agent will execute the test. Once finished, click on the **Browser Recording Artifact** in the chat history. You can actually watch a video playback of the agent clicking and typing on your application!
